titleStmt.title: SII 27.130: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 130. (A.R. No. 290 of 1931-32.) HĒRĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) set up in the temple of Janārdanadēva.

This record registers a gift of land garden, probably made after purchase, to god Janārdanadēva of Hērāḍi, for offerings of boiled rice mixed with curd, by Lakshumā-seṭṭiti, daughter of a seṭṭi whose name is lost. Ācharasa-oḍeya is stated to have been governing Bārakūrurājya under the orders of the king.
It is dated Śaka 1376, Śrīmukha, Āśvija śu. [1], corresponding to 1453 A.D., September 4, the Śaka year being current. The details are not, however, verifiable.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipataEṁ namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara
cāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī
jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1376 varttamana śrīmukha saṁvatsarada Āśvija
su1lu śrīmaṁmahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa mallikā
rjunarāyaru sukha saṁkathāvinōdadiṁ catusamudravanu pratipālisu
va kāladali Avara nirupadiṁ Ācarasa Oḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu pra
tipalisuvakāladali hērāḍiyalu janārdana dēvarige paṭṭaṇabaḷiyaṇa
seṭṭiya magaḷu lakhumā seṭṭittiharaśi janārdanadēvarige māḍida dharmamosa
rogarada nayavēdyakke koṁḍu biṭṭa tōṭa gadeya catusīmeya viva
ra mūḍalu yiśvara Ujiriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu janārdanadēvaraguḍi
yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu yagaḍi janārdana dēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu baḍagalu janārdanadēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya voḷagu
ḷa bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalu muḍe 2 ḍu yi bāḷige gēṇi Akkimūḍe
6 . ge nālkuvare mūḍe Upārake dinavoṁdake Aretārada mosaralli
mūḍe 2 ḍu Aṁtu Aṟuvare mūḍe Akṣaradalu Akkimūḍe Aṟuvare Akkiya
nū dēvarige Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi naḍavahāge dāna dārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāre
yaneradu koṭṭevagi janardanadēvara saṁnidhiyali Ayivara Oppa
gaḷa voppa ra Oppa maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
